---
title: "Voting Bills Analysis"
---
# Research Subject:
## Voting Bills Across Red, Blue, and Purple States
## My contribution: 
I did the litreture review and ran the LDA, ngram analysis.

## Files and codes:
To access to codes and files for our team analysis please click on the following links.
--- 
**Files:**
- [Setup Script](00_setup.R)
- [Legiscan Draft 1](LegiscanDraft 1.R)
- [Metadata Processing](01_metadata.R)
- [Data Preprocessing](02_preprocessing.R)
- [TF-IDF Analysis](03_tfidf.R)  
- [Topic Modeling](04_Ida.R)
- [LLM Classification](05_llm_classification.R)
- [Validation Code](06_validation.R)
- [AI Collaboration Log](07_ai_collab_log.R)

**Documentation:**
- [Preprocessing Guide](02_preprocessing_explained.html) | [Markdown](02_preprocessing_explained.md)
- [TF-IDF Guide](03_tfidf_explained.html) | [Markdown](03_tfidf_explained.md)
- [LDA Guide](04_Ida_explained.html) | [Markdown](04_Ida_explained.md)
- [LLM Guide](05_llm_explained.html) | [Markdown](05_llm_explained.md)
- [Validation Documentation](06_validation_explained.md)
